videos.headline: Jake Retzlaff breaks free for a 29-yard BYU TD
videos.description: Jake Retzlaff keeps it himself for a 29-yard rushing touchdown to put the Cougars on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jake Retzlaff breaks free for a 29-yard BYU TD) 2024/10/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: BYU runs fake FG to perfection as kicker gets 1st down
videos.description: BYU's holder snaps the ball between his legs to kicker Will Ferrin, who gains enough yardage for a first down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (BYU runs fake FG to perfection as kicker gets 1st down) 2024/10/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chase Roberts slips and tackle and races for a 62-yard BYU TD
videos.description: Chase Roberts breaks a tackle and turns on the jets for a 62-yard Cougars touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chase Roberts slips and tackle a races for and 62-yard BYU TD) 2024/10/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: UCF's TD and 2-point conversion pulls them closer
videos.description: RJ Harvey punches it in for his second touchdown, then Dylan Rizk finds pay dirt for a Knights two-point conversion.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (UCF's TD and 2-point conversion pulls them closer) 2024/10/26 ESHEET
